title: Cookie Economy
description: Adds an economy system for easier trading between players.
body:
# CookieEconomy --- **CookieEconomy** is a **datapack** based around **economy**, meant to make **trading** between players **easier** with just an exchange of **Cookie** money. ## Mechanics The **core mechanics** of this datapack are the **Work** and the **Transaction** mechanics.
You can see **all** the **mechanics** on the **[wiki](https://github.com/El-Kavio/CookieEconomy/wiki)**. ## How to update Simply **delete** the **CookieEconomy** folder and **replace** it with the **new** one! --- [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kavio)
